vibe: Warm, trustworthy, approachable, grounded, distinctly Indonesian without clichés.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.global_padding: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for sections. Cards need p-6 internal padding.

surfaces.marketing_hero: Solid background_base (#FDFBF7) with organic abstract shapes. Do not use generic full-screen gradients. Text is left-aligned.
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat solid white (#FFFFFF) with 1px border (#EBE7E0) and soft card shadow. Nested radius: child (rounded-xl) <= parent (rounded-2xl).
surfaces.storefront: Mobile-first grid. 2 columns on mobile for products. Generous padding. Product images must have bg-surface_off (#F5F2EA) behind them to pop.
surfaces.glassmorphism: Only use for sticky nav. bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border.

components.buttons: Thick padding (py-3 px-6), rounded-xl, font-semibold. Primary button: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but override border-radius to rounded-xl, border color to #EBE7E0, and focus ring to ring-primary/20 border-primary.
components.badges: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold bg-surface_off text-text_main border border-border.

animations.hover: Transition transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1).
animations.entrance: Staggered fade-up for product grids and features. Use framer-motion.

hero.alt: Indonesian female business owner at a market stall smiling

testimonials.alt: Community life in traditional Indonesian warung
Cheerful vendors at a vibrant Asian market stall

ai_studio_placeholder.alt: Coffee beans processing - representing raw product before AI enhancement

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. STRUCTURE: Design 3 distinct surfaces: Marketing Landing Page (B2B), Owner Dashboard (B2B SaaS), and Public Storefront (B2C).
2. LOCALIZATION: The target audience is Indonesian UMKM owners. Use Bahasa Indonesia ('Masuk', 'Daftar', 'Dashboard', 'Toko Saya', 'AI Studio').
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Apply 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Do not use generic fonts like Inter. Use Google Fonts.
4. VISUAL IDENTITY: Strictly use the warm, grounded 'Organic & Earthy' palette (Primary: #C04A3B, Base: #FDFBF7). Do NOT use generic purple/teal AI gradients.
5. DASHBOARD UX: Dashboard must be mobile-first. Use stacked cards and prioritize the 'AI Product Studio' feature. Keep it breathable.
6. STOREFRONT UX: Storefront must look like a high-end, clean shop page, easily browsable on mobile (2 columns).
7. MOTION: Use framer-motion for simple micro-interactions (e.g., hover states, dialog pop-ups, staggered list items).
8. TESTING: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
